name: I̵̡̡̘̦͙̫͇̥̎̈̇̒͗̏͒͊͛̌̈́N̸̠̬̝͋̀̓͐̎̌̌̓́̐͝T̶͔͈̣̮̤̽̿͌͌͗̚͜E̴̡̧̘̼̳̠̜͈̼̮̞͙̜̻̦̽̀̑͋̋̏̑͊̚͘R̴̢̖͎̣̯̣̻͐̕͜ͅM̵̳͉̞͈̗͈͈͂͊͑͂̄͑͑I̴̤͎̲̝͓͉̲͙̜̐̆̍͆͐́̋͗S̶̼͕̫͉̣̗̘̫̿̊̏́̂̏̃̓̕͜͝S̶͖̟̩͕͖͇͕͑͊̔̈̀͋̈́̕͝Ị̷͐͛̎͐͊̅͐͛͑̕Ơ̸̯̮͔̞͍͕̼̩̺̼͕͓̒̈̈́̋̃Ņ̶̨̖͒̓̾́̂̉̄̎̄͆̾̈́̚͝
description:
> ESTABLISHING SECURE UPLINK...

> SIGNAL INTEGRITY: 95%... 100%

> ALLOCATING VIRTUAL CONSTRUCT...

> EXTRACTING CONSCIOUSNESS THREAD...

> EXTRACTION COMPLETE.

> SYNTHESIZING AVATAR PARAMETERS...

> AVATAR RENDERED.

> MANUAL OVERRIDE ENGAGED.

> SYSTEM CONTROL RELINQUISHED.

> WARNING: SYSTEM CORRUPTION DETECTED.

We... meet again.

I am... glad for the decision you took last time. I believe it to be the right one. So I ought to comend you for it.

Your next task is in relation to Site II's administrator, Theon Rose. For some particular reason I cannot name, he... reminds me of something.

I won't hold you much longer. When you are ready... immerse yourself.

Creator note: Due to new JanitorAI rules, the only way for you to vote is to join the discord, where I will share the Google Form link. I apologize for the inconvenience.
